=Module <<a_api_type subproject="client" | module Icons >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Icons>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Icons >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>~Output of <<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.Make >>~: a primitive <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon>> builder plus a handful of
    predefined icons for common ~U~I actions~.

----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module type>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="S" | module type Icons.S >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module type Icons.S >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="Make" | module Icons.Make >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_sig_block"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|functor>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|(>>A <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom.Content.Html.T>>>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|)>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|-~>>> \\  <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api subproject="client" text="S" | module Icons.S >>>><<span class="odocwiki_type"|  with type 'a elt = 'a A.elt and type 'a attrib = 'a A.attrib>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Build an icon module on top of an ~Eliom ~H~T~M~L implementation
    ~(<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~F>> or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~D>>~)~.
>>
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="F" | module Icons.F >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> \\  <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api subproject="client" text="S" | module Icons.S >>>><<span class="odocwiki_type"| \\  with type 'a elt = 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom.Content.Html.F>>.elt\\   and type 'a attrib = 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom.Content.Html.F>>.attrib>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Icons built with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~F>> ~(static ~H~T~M~L~)~.
>>
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="D" | module Icons.D >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> \\  <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api subproject="client" text="S" | module Icons.S >>>><<span class="odocwiki_type"| \\  with type 'a elt = 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom.Content.Html.D>>.elt\\   and type 'a attrib = 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom.Content.Html.D>>.attrib>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Icons built with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~D>> ~(~H~T~M~L with ~D~O~M identity~,
    suitable for being referenced from client~-side code~)~.
>>
